speaker: Hillary R. Clinton
text: Post-war expansions of freedom — civil rights for Black Americans, women's rights, gay marriage — are blessings, not betrayals, and the current right-wing reaction is fundamentally an effort to control 'who we are, how we look, who we love' under cover of family and tradition.
context: Noted that more deportations occurred under Clinton and Obama than Trump's first term, but without detention camps or killings.

addressed_in_artifacts.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
